description: Lambus provides AI-powered software for the travel industry, including a white-label travel app, document-processing tools, and automation for DMC portal workflows. Its website presents these as modular products for tour operators and travel businesses.
summary: Lambus exposes two known MCP endpoints: an OAuth-protected Lambus MCP server at `https://mcp.lambus.ai/mcp` and a catalog-listed Tourlane MCP endpoint at `https://chatgpt-app-server.tourlane.wl.lambus.ai/mcp`; no public HTTP/GraphQL APIs or CLI docs were found on `lambus.ai`.
